name: Self Visa Credit Card
perks: No upfront cash deposit required - your Credit Builder Account loan payments fund your credit limit
Must open a Self Credit Builder Account first (loan builds savings while you build credit)
Reports to all three major credit bureaus
Designed for people with no credit or poor credit
Credit limit grows as you make loan payments
Can unlock card once you have $100 in loan savings and are in good standing
No hard credit check to apply for the Credit Builder Account
drawbacks: Must open and maintain a Self Credit Builder Account
Credit limit tied to savings in Credit Builder Account
